chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.14 of 2026 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For order on MA No.69/2026 (Urgent). 2. For order on MA No.70/2026 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of bail application. 02.01.2026 Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman Khan Safi, Advocate for Applicant a/w applicant. -------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this Criminal Bail Application the applicant, namely, Amir Sharif Rajput S/o Muhammad Sharif seeks protective bail in Crime No.1979/2025 for the offence under sections 420, 468, 471, PPC registered with Police Station Chilik, Punjab. Counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant has been falsely implicated in this case; that the name of the applicant is not mentioned in the FIR; that applicant apprehends his arrest by the hands of the police, which humiliate him, therefore, he may be granted protective bail enabling him to approach and surrender before the trial Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant above- named is admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling him to approach and surrender before the trial Court for a period of fifteen days. In case the applicant does not surrender before the trial Court within the above stipulated period, the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited.

Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant above- named is admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling him to approach and surrender before the trial Court for a period of fifteen days. In case the applicant does not surrender before the trial Court within the above stipulated period, the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant Crl. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Farhan/PS
